headline: Carlisle Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Organic Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: CSL beats Q1 earnings estimates but misses on revenues as sales decline and key segments face weak demand despite modest margin gains.

headline: 3M Company (MMM): High-Margin Industrial Powerhouse Attracts Defensive Investors
summary: We just covered the 14 Best Defensive Stocks to Invest In Now and 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) ranks 10th on this list. A major defensive catalyst for 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) is the successful separation of the healthcare business into Solventum. By spinning off its healthcare wing, finalized in 2024 and fully stabilized by early 2026, 3M […]
